body:
Causes some badness with Reactant when we use single precision
```julia
julia> x1 = Float32(0)
0.0f0

julia> x2 = Float32(10)
10.0f0

julia> range(x1, x2, 9)
0.0f0:1.25f0:10.0f0

julia> typeof(range(x1, x2, 9))
StepRangeLen{Float32, Float64, Float64, Int64}
```
title: Ensure discretization ranges match float type

body:
this is the only safe configuration to use an active cells map, we can then explore new ways to use it after this PR
supercedes #3920 (or probably a simpler step towards #3920)

labels.description: runs preconfigured benchamarks and spits out timing
labels.name: benchmark performance

title: Use active cells map when kernels try to launch with `:xyz` or `:xy`
Attempts to fix energy conservation for flux-form advection on curvilinear grids
